features: Compatible with Digital Terrestrial TV and DAB/FM radio signals within a 45-65 mile radius
Built-in high gain low noise amplifier for areas with poor signal strength
Adjustable loop aerial, pans and tilts for best UHF TV reception
2 x 728mm telescopic antennas for optimum VHF and FM radio reception
Variable gain control knob and Power LED indicator
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | High Definition Amplified Indoor Television Aerial Compatible with Digital, Terrestrial TV and DAB/FM radio signals A mains powered, amplified aerial compatible with Digital TV and DAB/FM radio signals. With an adjustable loop aerial for UHF TV signals and two telescopic aerials for VHF and FM radio signals, providing maximum flexibility even in low signal areas. Gain can also be manually adjusted on the unit and there is an LED indicator showing power supply. IMPORTANT: Performance will always be based on your area, your distance from local transmission tower (how far away you are from the local transmission tower will determine the performance of any aerial. For weaker performing areas, we would always recommend the full install of a outdoor digital aerial. PRODUCT FEATURES: Compatible with Digital Terrestrial TV and DAB/FM radio signals within a 45-65 mile radius Built-in high gain low noise amplifier for areas with poor signal strength Adjustable loop aerial, pans and tilts for best UHF TV reception 2 x 728mm telescopic antennas for optimum VHF and FM radio reception Variable gain control knob and Power LED indicator Cable length and connector: 1.2m RF (Coax) cable SPECIFICATION: Frequency range : UHF 470-694MHz(5G) Frequency range : VHF 40-230MHz Impedance 75 ohms Reception distance Up to 65 miles Gain 36dB Current consumption 50mA @12Vdc Power supply 230Vac, 50Hz or 12Vdc 50mA Lead length 1.2m RF (Coax) cable Dimensions 195 x 144 x 230mm Weight 500g
